name: obsidian
description: Connect Claude to your local Obsidian vault via MCP Tools plugin. Read, search, create and edit notes with Smart Connections semantic search.
long_description:
Connects Claude to your locally-running Obsidian vault via the MCP Tools plugin (jacksteamdev).

**Capabilities**
- Read, create, edit and delete notes
- Search by filename or content
- Smart Connections semantic search
- List vault structure
- Manage prompts and templates

**Requirements**
- Obsidian must be running with the MCP Tools plugin installed and enabled
- The MCP Tools plugin must have an API key configured

**Windows only** (uses the MCP Tools native binary).

tools.name: get_active_file
tools.description: Get the currently active file in Obsidian

tools.name: get_vault_file
tools.description: Read a specific file from the vault

tools.name: search_vault
tools.description: Search vault by filename or content

tools.name: search_vault_simple
tools.description: Simple text search across the vault

tools.name: create_vault_file
tools.description: Create a new file in the vault

tools.name: patch_vault_file
tools.description: Patch/update a file in the vault

tools.name: append_to_vault_file
tools.description: Append content to a vault file

tools.name: delete_vault_file
tools.description: Delete a file from the vault

tools.name: append_to_active_file
tools.description: Append content to the active file

tools.name: show_file_in_obsidian
tools.description: Open a file in the Obsidian UI

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return its content
